rationale: The cited paper appears only in grouped introductory citations, mainly to define product-harm crises and note their growing relevance over time. The citing paper does not discuss Dawar and Pillutla's expectations-based mechanism, response-strategy findings, or brand-equity framework in its hypothesis development or empirical design. Its core analysis (DID on eBay auction prices around Dieselgate) proceeds without a distinct functional dependence on this specific source.
